} return{draw}; })(); const INCUBATION_FIELD = (() => { let _l=0; function draw(ts){ if(ts-_l<110)return;_l=ts; const svg=document.getElementById('lightLayer');if(!svg)return; const cx=window.innerWidth/2,cy=window.innerHeight*0.5; const t=ts*0.0003; const c=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','circle'); c.setAttribute('cx',cx+Math.sin(t*0.7)*30);c.setAttribute('cy',cy+Math.cos(t*0.5)*20); c.setAttribute('r',20+Math.sin(t)*8);c.setAttribute('fill','rgba(120,80,200,0.04)'); c.setAttribute('stroke','#a4f');c.setAttribute('stroke-width','0.5');c.setAttribute('opacity','0.12'); svg.appendChild(c);setTimeout(()=>c.remove(),1200); } return{draw}; })(); const EUREKA_FLASH = (() => { let _l=0; function draw(ts){ if(ts-_l<4000+Math.random()*8000)return;_l=ts; const svg=document.getElementById('lightLayer');if(!svg)return; const cx=window.innerWidth/2+Math.random()*60-30,cy=window.innerHeight*0.35; for(let i=0;i<16;i++){ const a=i/16*Math.PI*2,r=10+Math.random()*50; const line=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','line'); line.setAttribute('x1',cx);line.setAttribute('y1',cy); line.setAttribute('x2',cx+Math.cos(a)*r);line.setAttribute('y2',cy+Math.sin(a)*r); line.setAttribute('stroke','#fff');line.setAttribute('stroke-width','1.5');line.setAttribute('opacity','0.3'); svg.appendChild(line);setTimeout(()=>line.remove(),600); } } return{draw}; })(); const DIVERGENT_BURST = (() => { let _l=0; function draw(ts){ if(ts-_l<80)return;_l=ts; const svg=document.getElementById('lightLayer');if(!svg)return; const cx=window.innerWidth/2,cy=window.innerHeight*0.45; const t=ts*0.001; for(let i=0;i<5;i++){ const a=t+i*1.257,r=20+i*15; const c=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','circle'); c.setAttribute('cx',cx+Math.cos(a)*r);c.setAttribute('cy',cy+Math.sin(a)*r*0.5); c.setAttribute('r','2.5');c.setAttribute('fill','#0ff');c.setAttribute('opacity','0.14'); svg.appendChild(c);setTimeout(()=>c.remove(),700); } } return{draw}; })(); const CONVERGENT_LOCK = (() => { let _l=0; function draw(ts){ if(ts-_l<100)return;_l=ts; const svg=document.getElementById('lightLayer');if(!svg)return; const cx=window.innerWidth/2,cy=window.innerHeight*0.45; const t=ts*0.001; for(let i=0;i<5;i++){ const a=t+i*1.257,r=60-i*10; const line=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','line'); line.setAttribute('x1',cx+Math.cos(a)*r);line.setAttribute('y1',cy+Math.sin(a)*r*0.5); line.setAttribute('x2',cx);line.setAttribute('y2',cy); line.setAttribute('stroke','#fa4');line.setAttribute('stroke-width','0.8');line.setAttribute('opacity','0.1'); svg.appendChild(line);setTimeout(()=>line.remove(),700); } } return{draw}; })(); const AESTHETIC_CHILL = (() => { let _l=0; function draw(ts){ if(ts-_l<3000+Math.random()*6000)return;_l=ts; const svg=document.getElementById('lightLayer');if(!svg)return; const cx=window.innerWidth/2,cy=window.innerHeight*0.5; for(let i=0;i<20;i++){ setTimeout(()=>{ const c=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','circle'); c.setAttribute('cx',cx+Math.random()*200-100);c.setAttribute('cy',cy+Math.random()*200-100); c.setAttribute('r',1+Math.random()*3);c.setAttribute('fill','#fff');c.setAttribute('opacity','0.2'); svg.appendChild(c);setTimeout(()=>c.remove(),1500); },i*50); } } return{draw}; })(); const FLOW_CHANNEL = (() => { let _l=0; function draw(ts){ if(ts-_l<60)return;_l=ts; const svg=document.getElementById('lightLayer');if(!svg)return; const cx=window.innerWidth/2,cy=window.innerHeight*0.5; const t=ts*0.0005; const path=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','path'); const y1=cy-30+Math.sin(t)*10,y2=cy+30+Math.cos(t)*10; path.setAttribute('d',`M ${cx-100} ${y1} Q ${cx} ${cy} ${cx+100} ${y2}`); path.setAttribute('fill','none');path.setAttribute('stroke','#4af'); path.setAttribute('stroke-width','2');path.setAttribute('opacity','0.1'); svg.appendChild(path);setTimeout(()=>path.remove(),700); } return{draw}; })(); const CREATIVE_BLOCK = (() => { let _l=0; function draw(ts){ if(ts-_l<180)return;_l=ts; const svg=document.getElementById('lightLayer');if(!svg)return; const cx=window.innerWidth/2,cy=window.innerHeight*0.5; const t=ts*0.0003,s=0.5+0.5*Math.sin(t*0.5); const rect=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','rect'); rect.setAttribute('x',cx-30*s);rect.setAttribute('y',cy-30*s); rect.setAttribute('width',60*s);rect.setAttribute('height',60*s); rect.setAttribute('fill','none');rect.setAttribute('stroke','rgba(100,100,130,0.15)'); rect.setAttribute('stroke-width','1'); svg.appendChild(rect);setTimeout(()=>rect.remove(),1200); } return{draw}; })(); const INSPIRATION_WAVE = (() => { let _l=0; function draw(ts){ if(ts-_l<90)return;_l=ts; const svg=document.getElementById('lightLayer');if(!svg)return; const cx=window.innerWidth/2,cy=window.innerHeight*0.45; const t=ts*0.001; const path=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','path'); let d=`M ${cx-80} ${cy}`; for(let i=0;i<=8;i++){ const x=cx-80+i*20,y=cy-Math.sin(t+i*0.9)*25*(1-i/16); d+=` L ${x} ${y}`; } path.setAttribute('d',d);path.setAttribute('fill','none');path.setAttribute('stroke','#f4a'); path.setAttribute('stroke-width','1.5');path.setAttribute('opacity','0.14'); svg.appendChild(path);setTimeout(()=>path.remove(),700); } return{draw}; })(); const PATTERN_RECOGNITION_POP = (() => { let _l=0; function draw(ts){ if(ts-_l<1200+Math.random()*2000)return;_l=ts; const svg=document.getElementById('lightLayer');if(!svg)return; const cx=window.innerWidth/2+Math.random()*80-40,cy=window.innerHeight*0.4+Math.random()*60-30; const g=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','g'); for(let i=0;i<6;i++){ const a=i/6*Math.PI*2,r=12+i*4; const c=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','circle'); c.setAttribute('cx',cx+Math.cos(a)*r);c.setAttribute('cy',cy+Math.sin(a)*r*0.5); c.setAttribute('r','2');c.setAttribute('fill','#0ff');c.setAttribute('opacity','0.2'); g.appendChild(c); } svg.appendChild(g);setTimeout(()=>g.remove(),700); } return{draw}; })(); const ASSOCIATIVE_LEAP = (() => { let _l=0; function draw(ts){ if(ts-_l<800+Math.random()*1500)return;_l=ts; const svg=document.getElementById('lightLayer');if(!svg)return; const cx=window.innerWidth/2,cy=window.innerHeight*0.45; const x1=cx+Math.random()*120-60,y1=cy+Math.random()*60-30; const x2=cx+Math.random()*120-60,y2=cy+Math.random()*60-30; const path=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','path'); path.setAttribute('d',`M ${x1} ${y1} Q ${cx} ${cy-40} ${x2} ${y2}`); path.setAttribute('fill','none');path.setAttribute('stroke','#a4f'); path.setAttribute('stroke-width','1.5');path.setAttribute('stroke-dasharray','4 6'); path.setAttribute('opacity','0.2'); svg.appendChild(path);setTimeout(()=>path.remove(),1000); } return{draw}; })(); const BINDING_PROBLEM = (() => { let _l=0; function draw(ts){ if(ts-_l<70)return;_l=ts; const svg=document.getElementById('lightLayer');if(!svg)return; const cx=window.innerWidth/2,cy=window.innerHeight*0.5; const t=ts*0.0009; const colors=['#f44','#4af','#4f8','#fa4','#a4f']; colors.forEach((col,i)=>{ const a=t+i*1.257,r=30+i*12; const c=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','circle'); c.setAttribute('cx',cx+Math.cos(a)*r);c.setAttribute('cy',cy+Math.sin(a)*r*0.5); c.setAttribute('r','3');c.setAttribute('fill',col);c.setAttribute('opacity','0.12'); svg.appendChild(c);setTimeout(()=>c.remove(),600); }); } return{draw}; })(); const HARD_PROBLEM_PULSE = (() => { let _l=0; function draw(ts){ if(ts-_l<100)return;_l=ts; const svg=document.getElementById('lightLayer');if(!svg)return; const cx=window.innerWidth/2,cy=window.innerHeight*0.5; const t=ts*0.001,r=60+Math.sin(t*0.5)*30; const c=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','circle'); c.setAttribute('cx',cx);c.setAttribute('cy',cy);c.setAttribute('r',r); c.setAttribute('fill','none');c.setAttribute('stroke','rgba(255,255,255,0.04)'); c.setAttribute('stroke-width','2'); svg.appendChild(c);setTimeout(()=>c.remove(),900); } return{draw}; })(); const QUALIA_SHIMMER = (() => { let _l=0; function draw(ts){ if(ts-_l<55)return;_l=ts; const svg=document.getElementById('lightLayer');if(!svg)return; const cx=window.innerWidth/2,cy=window.innerHeight*0.5; const t=ts*0.0015; const hue=Math.floor((t*30)%360); const c=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','circle'); c.setAttribute('cx',cx+Math.sin(t)*20);c.setAttribute('cy',cy+Math.cos(t*0.7)*15); c.setAttribute('r',4+Math.sin(t*3)*2); c.setAttribute('fill',`hsla(${hue},80%,70%,0.12)`); svg.appendChild(c);setTimeout(()=>c.remove(),500); } return{draw}; })(); const EXPLANATORY_GAP = (() => { let _l=0; function draw(ts){ if(ts-_l<120)return;_l=ts; const svg=document.getElementById('lightLayer');if(!svg)return; const cx=window.innerWidth/2,cy=window.innerHeight*0.5; const t=ts*0.0004,gap=20+Math.sin(t)*15; const line1=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','line'); line1.setAttribute('x1',cx-80);line1.setAttribute('y1',cy);line1.setAttribute('x2',cx-gap);line1.setAttribute('y2',cy); line1.setAttribute('stroke','#4af');line1.setAttribute('stroke-width','1.5');line1.setAttribute('opacity','0.15'); const line2=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','line'); line2.setAttribute('x1',cx+gap);line2.setAttribute('y1',cy);line2.setAttribute('x2',cx+80);line2.setAttribute('y2',cy); line2.setAttribute('stroke','#f44');line2.setAttribute('stroke-width','1.5');line2.setAttribute('opacity','0.15'); svg.appendChild(line1);svg.appendChild(line2); setTimeout(()=>{line1.remove();line2.remove();},900); } return{draw}; })(); const INTEGRATED_INFORMATION = (() => { let _l=0; function draw(ts){ if(ts-_l<80)return;_l=ts; const svg=document.getElementById('lightLayer');if(!svg)return; const cx=window.innerWidth/2,cy=window.innerHeight*0.5; const t=ts*0.0007; const nodes=6; for(let i=0;iline.remove(),700); } } } return{draw}; })(); const GLOBAL_WORKSPACE_BROADCAST = (() => { let _l=0; function draw(ts){ if(ts-_l<1500+Math.random()*3000)return;_l=ts; const svg=document.getElementById('lightLayer');if(!svg)return; const cx=window.innerWidth/2,cy=window.innerHeight*0.5; for(let r=20;r<=120;r+=20){ const c=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','circle'); c.setAttribute('cx',cx);c.setAttribute('cy',cy);c.setAttribute('r',r); c.setAttribute('fill','none');c.setAttribute('stroke','#fff'); c.setAttribute('stroke-width','1');c.setAttribute('opacity','0.1'); svg.appendChild(c);setTimeout(()=>c.remove(),1200); } } return{draw}; })(); const PREDICTIVE_CODING_LOOP = (() => { let _l=0; function draw(ts){ if(ts-_l<90)return;_l=ts; const svg=document.getElementById('lightLayer');if(!svg)return; const cx=window.innerWidth/2,cy=window.innerHeight*0.45; const t=ts*0.001; const pred=cy-20+Math.sin(t)*30; const actual=cy-20+Math.sin(t+0.5)*30; const err=Math.abs(pred-actual); const line=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','line'); line.setAttribute('x1',cx-40);line.setAttribute('y1',pred); line.setAttribute('x2',cx+40);line.setAttribute('y2',actual); line.setAttribute('stroke','#f80');line.setAttribute('stroke-width',1+err*0.05); line.setAttribute('opacity',0.05+err*0.005); svg.appendChild(line);setTimeout(()=>line.remove(),700); } return{draw}; })(); const ACTIVE_INFERENCE = (() => { let _l=0; function draw(ts){ if(ts-_l<100)return;_l=ts; const svg=document.getElementById('lightLayer');if(!svg)return; const cx=window.innerWidth/2,cy=window.innerHeight*0.5; const t=ts*0.001; const tx=cx+Math.cos(t*0.4)*60,ty=cy+Math.sin(t*0.3)*30; const ax=cx+Math.cos(t)*20,ay=cy+Math.sin(t)*10; const line=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','line'); line.setAttribute('x1',ax);line.setAttribute('y1',ay); line.setAttribute('x2',ax+(tx-ax)*0.3);line.setAttribute('y2',ay+(ty-ay)*0.3); line.setAttribute('stroke','#4af');line.setAttribute('stroke-width','1');line.setAttribute('opacity','0.12'); svg.appendChild(line);setTimeout(()=>line.remove(),700); } return{draw}; })(); const FREE_ENERGY_PRINCIPLE = (() => { let _l=0; function draw(ts){ if(ts-_l<80)return;_l=ts; const svg=document.getElementById('lightLayer');if(!svg)return; const cx=window.innerWidth/2,cy=window.innerHeight*0.5; const t=ts*0.0005,energy=0.3+0.7*Math.abs(Math.sin(t)); const r=20+energy*60; const c=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','circle'); c.setAttribute('cx',cx);c.setAttribute('cy',cy);c.setAttribute('r',r); c.setAttribute('fill','none');c.setAttribute('stroke','#fa4'); c.setAttribute('stroke-width','0.8');c.setAttribute('opacity',0.04+energy*0.08); svg.appendChild(c);setTimeout(()=>c.remove(),700); } return{draw}; })(); const STRANGE_LOOP = (() => { let _l=0; function draw(ts){ if(ts-_l<60)return;_l=ts; const svg=document.getElementById('lightLayer');if(!svg)return; const cx=window.innerWidth/2,cy=window.innerHeight*0.5; const t=ts*0.001; const x=cx+Math.sin(t)*50+Math.sin(t*2)*25; const y=cy+Math.cos(t*1.5)*30+Math.cos(t*3)*15; const c=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','circle'); c.setAttribute('cx',x);c.setAttribute('cy',y);c.setAttribute('r','2'); c.setAttribute('fill','#fff');c.setAttribute('opacity','0.1'); svg.appendChild(c);setTimeout(()=>c.remove(),800); } return{draw}; })(); (function(){ const _batch18=['REM_ARCHITECTURE','SLOW_WAVE_SLEEP','SLEEP_SPINDLE','K_COMPLEX','CIRCADIAN_MASTER_CLOCK', 'MELATONIN_TIDE','ADENOSINE_PRESSURE','SLEEP_DEBT','MICROSLEEP_FLICKER','DREAM_CONSOLIDATION', 'ENDORPHIN_FLOOD','ENKEPHALIN_GATE','SUBSTANCE_P_SIGNAL','ALLODYNIA_FIELD','PHANTOM_LIMB_ECHO', 'PLEASURE_PEAK','REWARD_ANTICIPATION','HEDONIC_BASELINE','ANHEDONIA_SHADOW','PAIN_CATASTROPHIZING', 'FACE_RECOGNITION_FLASH','GAZE_DETECTION','SOCIAL_EXCLUSION_ACHE','PROSOCIAL_IMPULSE','ALTRUISM_SPARK', 'STATUS_SIGNAL','DOMINANCE_DISPLAY','SUBMISSION_YIELD','COALITION_SENSE','OUTGROUP_THREAT', 'INCUBATION_FIELD','EUREKA_FLASH','DIVERGENT_BURST','CONVERGENT_LOCK','AESTHETIC_CHILL', 'FLOW_CHANNEL','CREATIVE_BLOCK','INSPIRATION_WAVE','PATTERN_RECOGNITION_POP','ASSOCIATIVE_LEAP', 'BINDING_PROBLEM','HARD_PROBLEM_PULSE','QUALIA_SHIMMER','EXPLANATORY_GAP','INTEGRATED_INFORMATION', 'GLOBAL_WORKSPACE_BROADCAST','PREDICTIVE_CODING_LOOP','ACTIVE_INFERENCE','FREE_ENERGY_PRINCIPLE','STRANGE_LOOP']; let _lt=0; function loop(ts){if(ts-_lt>14){_lt=ts;_batch18.forEach(n=>{const s=window[n];if(s&&typeof s.draw==='function')s.draw(ts);});}requestAnimationFrame(loop);} requestAnimationFrame(loop); })(); // ===== END BATCH 18 =====
